summary: Support Pod feature testing completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend Playwright tests passed. The Support Pod page loads with all 5 blocks visible and all interactions working correctly.

minor.issue: When completing/modifying a suggested action (not yet in DB), the original owner field is not preserved when saving to DB. Actions created via intervention suggestions lose their owner field when patched.

issues: Filter testid uses 'timeline-filter-note' (singular) instead of 'timeline-filter-notes' (plural) as documented - minor naming inconsistency

action_items: MINOR: Fix PATCH endpoint to preserve original action fields (owner, title, due_date) when saving suggested actions to DB
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for backend tests (actions with unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Pod feature fully working. Data-testids confirmed: support-pod-page, pod-header, back-to-mc, pod-athlete-name, pod-health-badge, active-issue-banner, banner-why, banner-what-changed, banner-dismiss, banner-resolve, banner-log-call, athlete-snapshot, snapshot-momentum, snapshot-stage, snapshot-targets, pod-members, pod-member-club_coach, pod-member-parent, pod-member-athlete, next-actions, add-action-btn, add-action-form, new-action-title, submit-action, action-item-{id}, complete-action-{id}, treatment-timeline, timeline-filter-all, timeline-filter-note (singular not plural), timeline-entry-{id}. Navigation flow MC → Peek Panel → Support Pod preserves context parameter. Pod health badge shows green/yellow/red based on activity.
mocked_api_note: Athletes, interventions, pod members are MOCKED (mock_data.py). Actions, notes, assignments, messages, resolutions persist in MongoDB.

GET /support-pods/{athlete_id}: With context parameter returns full pod data with matching active_intervention
Without context returns data with highest-scored intervention as active
Pod members structure has 3 members (coach, parent, athlete) with correct fields
POST /support-pods/{athlete_id}/actions: Creates new action with status='ready' and source='manual'
Action appears in pod actions list after creation
PATCH /support-pods/{athlete_id}/actions: status=completed marks action done with completed_at timestamp
Completing suggested action saves to DB
POST /support-pods/{athlete_id}/resolve: Creates resolution record with category and resolution_note

page_structure: Support Pod page loads with all 5 blocks visible
PodHeader shows athlete name, grad year, position, team
Pod health badge shows correct color and label (Healthy/Needs Attention/At Risk)
active_issue_banner: Banner shows WHY, WHAT CHANGED, RECOMMENDED, and Owner
Banner dismiss button (X) hides the banner
Mark Resolved button creates resolution and hides banner
Log Call button opens note input form
athlete_snapshot: Shows momentum score with trend indicator
Shows upcoming events with days away
pod_members: Shows 3 members: Club Coach, Parent/Guardian, Athlete
Shows PRIMARY badge on primary owner
Task counts update when actions are assigned
next_actions: Actions grouped by owner (Coach Martinez, Parent/Guardian)
Checkbox click completes action with toast
Add button opens form with title input and owner select
Submit creates action and shows toast
Completed actions shown in collapsed section
treatment_timeline: Shows all entry types: notes, assignments, messages, resolutions, action_events
Entries grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, or date)
Filter pills work: All, Notes, Assignments, Messages, Resolutions
Each entry shows icon, text, author, and timestamp
navigation: MC → Priority Alert click → Peek Panel opens
Peek Panel → 'Open Support Pod' → navigates to /support-pods/:id?context=:category
Support Pod → '← Mission Control' → navigates back to /mission-control
Context parameter preserved in URL and used for active_intervention
